description: Model-agnostic Sanhedrin backend recipes. Presets are suggestions only; users may set any OpenAI-compatible endpoint and model name.

custom-openai-compatible.label: Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint
custom-openai-compatible.bestFor: Any model/server the user already trusts

small-laptop-ollama.label: Small laptop Ollama
small-laptop-ollama.bestFor: 8-16 GB RAM laptops that need a lightweight offline verifier
small-laptop-ollama.setup: Install Ollama, then pull any small instruct model you trust, for example: ollama pull llama3.2:3b or ollama pull qwen2.5:7b
tradeoffs: weaker contradiction judgment than larger models

balanced-local-ollama.label: Balanced local Ollama
balanced-local-ollama.bestFor: 16-32 GB RAM machines using 7B-14B local models
balanced-local-ollama.setup: Install Ollama and pull a balanced verifier model such as qwen3:14b, llama3.1:8b, or another OpenAI-compatible local model.
tradeoffs: model quality depends on the exact model selected

mlx-qwen3.6-apple-silicon.label: MLX Qwen3.6 35B A3B, Apple Silicon local
mlx-qwen3.6-apple-silicon.bestFor: High-memory Apple Silicon users who explicitly choose the strong MLX path

hosted-openai-compatible.label: Hosted OpenAI-compatible API
hosted-openai-compatible.bestFor: Users who want zero local model setup
hosted-openai-compatible.requires: VESTIGE_SANHEDRIN_API_KEY exported in the hook environment and a model chosen by the user/provider

anthropic-via-litellm.label: Anthropic through LiteLLM OpenAI-compatible proxy
anthropic-via-litellm.bestFor: Claude users who already run LiteLLM
anthropic-via-litellm.setup: Run LiteLLM locally with an Anthropic model, then point Sanhedrin at the proxy.
